
# Nyxhora UI — Modern React Component Library (2026)

> **Version:** 1.0.0 (Beta)
> **Website:** https://ui.nyxhora.com
> **Documentation:** https://ui.nyxhora.com/docs
> **GitHub:** https://github.com/nyxhora/nyxhora-ui
> **License:** MIT
> **Changelog:** https://ui.nyxhora.com/docs/changelog

## Quick Install

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add "https://ui.nyxhora.com/r/<component-name>.json"
```

Replace `<component-name>` with the component slug, e.g., `button`, `magic-card`, `floating-dock`.

## Why Choose Nyxhora UI in 2026?

- 🚀 **Future-Proof Design:** Built for the latest React and Next.js, with modern patterns and best practices.
- 🧩 **Composable & Modular:** 75+ components, each fully customizable and easy to integrate.
- 🎨 **Premium Visuals:** Stunning effects, animations, and accessibility out-of-the-box.
- 🌙 **Dark Mode & Theming:** Seamless theme switching and full CSS variable support.
- ♿ **Accessibility First:** WCAG-compliant, built on Radix UI primitives.
- 📱 **Responsive:** Mobile-first, works perfectly on all devices.
- 📝 **TypeScript First:** Full type safety and developer-friendly APIs.
- 🛠️ **Open Source & Actively Maintained:** MIT licensed, with a growing community.

## Component Categories, Use Cases & Descriptions

### Form Components
- **Button**: For all types of actions, with variants for primary, secondary, destructive, and more.
- **Awesome Button**: Animated, eye-catching button for CTAs and special actions.
- **Magic Button**: Button with advanced effects for modern UIs and landing pages.
- **Input**: Standard text input for forms, search, and data entry.
- **Textarea**: Multi-line input for comments, feedback, and messaging.
- **Checkbox**: For toggling boolean values, preferences, and settings.
- **Radio Group**: Select one from many options, e.g., gender, plan type.
- **Select**: Dropdown for picking from a list, e.g., country, language.
- **Slider**: Range selection, e.g., price, volume, rating.
- **Switch**: Toggle between on/off states, e.g., dark mode, notifications.
- **Label**: Accessible labels for form fields.

### Display Components
- **Alert**: Show important messages, warnings, or confirmations.
- **Avatar**: User profile images, team members, or placeholders.
- **Badge**: Status, notification counts, or feature highlights.
- **Shiny Card**: Visually striking card for featured content or pricing.
- **Magic Card**: Animated card for interactive showcases or portfolios.
- **Magic Text**: Text with animated borders for hero sections or branding.
- **Spotlight Text**: Highlighted text for emphasis or callouts.
- **Variable Shadow Text**: Dynamic shadow effects for modern typography.
- **Sparkles**: Add sparkle effects to text or icons for delight.
- **Component Showcard**: Showcase a component or feature in a card layout.
- **Skeleton**: Loading placeholders for async content.
- **Spinner**: Animated loading indicator for async actions.
- **Progress**: Show task or upload progress.
- **Separator**: Visual divider between sections or elements.
- **Cover**: Large image or banner for headers and hero sections.

### Overlay Components
- **Dialog**: Modal windows for confirmations, forms, or info.
- **Sheet**: Slide-out panels for menus, carts, or settings.
- **Action Bar**: Expandable action list for quick actions or toolbars.
- **3D Card**: Cards with 3D perspective for interactive UIs.
- **Tooltip**: Hover tips for extra info or guidance.
- **Sonner**: Toast notifications for feedback and alerts.
- **Dynamic Island**: iOS-style notification island for live updates.

### Navigation
- **Navbar Menu**: Main navigation links for your app or site.
- **Tabs**: Organize content into tabbed sections.
- **URL Tabs**: Tabs synced with the URL for deep linking.
- **Floating Dock Dialog**: Dock with bottom sheet dialog for quick access.
- **Footer**: Site or app footer with links and info.
- **Workspace Label**: Workspace switcher with member avatars for SaaS apps.

### Layout
- **Scroll Area**: Custom scrollable containers for overflow content.
- **Image Slider**: Responsive slider for images or testimonials.
- **Corner Grid**: Tech-inspired grid layouts for features or stats.
- **Image Grid**: Interactive hero image grid for galleries or portfolios.

### Effects & Animations
- **Background Beams**: Animated beams for backgrounds or hero sections.
- **Background Lines**: Animated line patterns for modern backgrounds.
- **Geist Background**: Flickering background for unique visual identity.
- **Shooting Stars**: Animated starfield for landing pages or events.
- **Color Drip**: Animated color lines for dynamic backgrounds.
- **Glowing Dot Grid**: Interactive dot grid with glow for tech UIs.
- **Glowing Effect**: Glow animations for buttons, cards, or icons.
- **Sparkles**: Particle effects for celebratory or festive UIs.
- **Spotlight**: Spotlight hover effects for interactive elements.
- **Smooth Cursor**: Smoothly animated cursor for immersive experiences.
- **Animated Shiny Text**: Shimmering text for attention-grabbing headlines.
- **Gradient Text**: Customizable gradient text for branding.
- **Hover Reveal Text**: Blur-to-reveal text for playful UIs.
- **Flip Words**: Word flip animation for dynamic headlines.
- **Text Hover Effect**: Text animations on hover for interactivity.
- **Rainbow Button**: Animated rainbow gradient button for fun CTAs.
- **Ants Card**: Card with animated walking ants for playful UIs.
- **Gradient Background**: Configurable gradient backgrounds for sections.
- **Code Block**: Syntax-highlighted code blocks for docs and blogs.
- **Anime Card**: Glassmorphism anime card for creative showcases.
- **Music Player**: Glassmorphism music player for audio features.

### Utilities
- **Exit Intent Demo**: Detects when users are about to leave, for popups or offers.

## What Makes Nyxhora UI Components Great?

- **Performance:** Optimized for speed and minimal bundle size.
- **Visual Impact:** Unique, modern, and beautiful animations and effects.
- **Developer Experience:** Intuitive props, clear documentation, and easy customization.

## Tech Stack

- **React 19** + **Next.js 15** (App Router)
- **TypeScript** for full type safety
- **Tailwind CSS v4** for styling
- **Radix UI** for accessible primitives
- **Framer Motion** for animations
- **class-variance-authority (CVA)** for variant management

## Installation Prerequisites

```bash
# 1. Create Next.js project (if starting fresh)
npx create-next-app@latest my-app --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app

# 2. Initialize shadcn
npx shadcn@latest init

# 3. Add any Nyxhora UI component
npx shadcn@latest add "https://ui.nyxhora.com/r/button.json"
```

## Contact & Community

- **Website:** https://ui.nyxhora.com
- **GitHub Issues:** https://github.com/nyxhora/nyxhora-ui/issues
- **Twitter/X:** https://twitter.com/nyxhora
- **Ready for 2026:** Uses the latest React, Next.js, and TypeScript features.
- **Community Driven:** Inspired by the best (shadcn/ui, Aceternity UI, Radix UI) and improved for the future.

For more, visit https://ui.nyxhora.com/docs
